response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and excellent communication skills, they fall critically short on the primary mandatory requirement: only ~6-7 months of documented professional C++ experience (2014-2015) against the required 5-10 years. No Windows platform experience is mentioned. Financial services domain exposure is minimal and vague (RIDE Capital reference). SQL experience is listed but not substantiated with specific projects or platform depth.
strengths: Excellent communication and teaching abilities demonstrated through multiple workshops and public talks
Strong CI/CD and DevOps expertise with hands-on GitLab, Docker, and deployment infrastructure experience
Proven learning agility across diverse technical domains and languages
concerns: Critical gap: Only ~6-7 months of professional C++ experience versus mandatory 5-10 years requirement
No documented Windows platform development experience; career focused on web, mobile, and GIS systems
Minimal capital markets or fixed-income domain knowledge; recent roles in web/AI infrastructure unrelated to financial systems
